title: Homebrew installation in install.md
body:
Add brew installation instructions to docs & small fix to brew makefile

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <ashleycui16@gmail.com>

comments.body:
Changes LGTM
But remote test isn't happy.  I don't think it's related, but don't know that.
We have too many test VMs and too many infrequent flakes at this point - every PR is almost guaranteed to hit at least one.
